event_description: A hackthon will be happing in my collage on the theme farming and technology
conversation_starters: Why do some people dislike games and others like technology in general (e.-g., mobile phones)? Is there a difference between these two categories of "games"? I don't think so... but the question seems quite obvious given that they're both highly addictive for many reasons - namely because those who enjoy them often feel good about themselves even if it takes hours or days before enjoying something else at all! I'm not saying anyone should take an interest without getting into technical details; though perhaps we need more clarity from one person when discussing how much fun gaming is now versus what was considered too easy by our average consumer once he's made up his mind :-) So please ask me questions here....
